scope: D1-A framing + D1-B1 bodies (01/60/62/64/7d) + D1-B2 bodies (10/11/20-25 service+txn admission); not full D1 catalog
required_workspace_bytes_definition: Additional caller-provided scratch beyond explicit inputs, outputs, and state/context objects. Current D1-A/D1-B1/D1-B2 APIs have no workspace parameter; value is 0.

vectors.notes: UINT64_MAX-7 message bits; padding not counted against message limit
NULL data with nonzero length via body_length sentinel
